race.description: Sportsbet Photo Finish Refund Mdn Plate
race.comment: WORD GAME (14) has found the line nicely in her two runs back and should be hitting her straps now. Drawn kinder for Holder this time and is ready to get off the mark. GRAND MILLESIME (15) was okay fresh in her stable debut when plugging on into a midfield finish at headquarters. Is sure to have come on from that and is another that is drawn cosy. Should be right there when they quicken. TORPEDOES (10) caught the eye last start when darting back up the inside to finish third. Nearing his top now fourth-up and is one of the key hopes. NO BAIL (6) was much better second-up and is open to further improvement. Not dismissing.
